text: Eating a balanced diet, getting regular exercise, and prioritising sleep are all key to physical health. But healthy living also involves your mental well-being and your overall schedule. For example, managing stress through hobbies or relaxation is just as important as eating your vegetables. To feel your best, try to find a work-life balance that leaves you time for both productivity and rest. Even short walks or a few minutes of quiet reading can improve your mood. Remember, true health means caring for your body and mind together, every day.
